inputs.normalization_note: Q1 2026 stockholders' equity $240.2M; wind-down legacy iStar assets + ~13.5M Safehold shares; not normalized operating FCF.

optionality_gate.notes: Price ~57% below Q1 2026 book; asset-sale and repurchase path; margin loan on SAFE stake caps downside vs zero but adds complexity.

nav_overlay.correction_note: Prior cash_net_debt per_share of -1.19 was arithmetic error ((67.2-207)/shares≈-11.6). Corrected; residual Magnolia/Asbury carrying outside MD&A monetizing bucket added.

lines.label: Safehold Inc. stake (~13.525M shares implied)
lines.evidence: Q1 FV $183.0M at SAFE $13.53; implied shares 13,525,499. Current SAFE $16.93 → $229.0M (18.95/sh).

lines.label: MD&A monetizing portfolio (loan, AFS, land, other props)
lines.evidence: Q1 MD&A: loan $16.1M + AFS $38.2M + land $14.4M + other props $2.7M.

lines.label: Residual land & development + operating real estate
lines.evidence: L&D net $100.5M + RE net $70.2M minus monetizing land/other already counted.

lines.label: Safe Credit Facility + Margin Loan (net)
lines.evidence: Safe Credit $115.0M @ 8%; Margin Loan $92.8M @ SOFR+3.50%; debt net $207.0M. Prior overlay used wrong -1.19/sh.

bear.notes: Slow legacy sales; SAFE mark compression; buybacks stall

base.notes: ~75% of Q1 book realized via asset sales, SAFE dividends, and repurchases

lines.label: Wind-down realization haircut
lines.math: Base assumes 75% of book ($15/sh) not full $19.88

stance_proposal.override_reason: Externally managed by Safehold affiliate; wind-down timing uncertain despite book discount

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Some legacy assets at zero carrying value; SAFE marked to market

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / acreage / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Magnolia Green ~1,900 acres entitled; Asbury Park waterfront venture deconsolidated 3/27/2026

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Single wind-down segment; Q1 net loss driven by SAFE mark and operating costs

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: 13.5M SAFE shares $183M fair value; margin loan limits sale timing

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Capital return via repurchases, not recurring distributions

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Revenue from leases, loan interest, SAFE dividends

ground_lease_duration.evidence: SAFE IR: ~99-year typical leases; ~91–92 year W.A. extended term. Long-duration equity mark.

valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Use one complete component schedule; preserve the range and evidence block until every material assumption is reconciled.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: The recovery range applies haircuts to the disclosed loans, AFS securities, land, and properties; the base case relies on repayment and land-sale evidence while zero-carry claims receive no value here.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Realization is modeled through the five-year wind-down horizon, with specific sale and repayment timing remaining uncertain.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No incremental development capital is attributed to this monetizing bucket; sale costs and wind-down friction are deducted separately in wind_down_fee_and_friction_reserve.

component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: The base case gives partial credit to carrying value because 2023 through Q1 2026 land and lot sales exceeded cost of sales, while the low case allows slow or distressed realization and the high case approaches carrying.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Land and operating-real-estate realization is modeled over the five-year wind-down horizon; no immediate sale of the remaining operating real estate is assumed.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: The component is valued after its carrying-value haircut; no separate development budget is added, and fee and sale-friction deductions remain in wind_down_fee_and_friction_reserve.

component_groups.economic_claim: Zero-carry claims and entitlement surplus option

component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: The low case assigns zero, the base assigns only $0.20 per share, and the high case requires incremental recovery from zero-carry claims or entitlement surplus beyond Magnolia/Asbury carrying cases.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Any recovery is treated as a contingent result within the five-year wind-down horizon, not as current cash or a contracted asset sale.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No incremental owner-funded development spend is credited to this option; any continuing holding, entitlement, management, or sale costs are captured in the existing operating and wind-down reserve components.

wisdom_applied: Klarman: book is an anchor; prior -1.19 cash/debt identity was a false bridge.
Greenblatt: finite asset-sale / capital-return event tree.
Horizon Kinetics: market-structure discount on a post-spin orphan.
limitations: Exact integer SAFE share count not disclosed (derived from FV/price).
Numeric margin LTV trigger levels not disclosed in 10-Q.
No asset-level third-party bids for Magnolia/Asbury residual.

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

additive_components.label: Safehold Inc. equity stake (~13.525M shares)
additive_components.evidence: FACT spin/merger mark: SAFE closed $25.80 on 2023-03-31 (Yahoo; post 0.16 split on merger day), ~$25/share round number. At 13,525,499 implied shares that is $338.1M = $27.99/STHO share vs current Yahoo SAFE $16.93 → $18.95/STHO share (about -32% below deal mark). FACT Q1 10-Q Note 7: ~13.5M shares / 18.8%, FV $183.0M at $13.53 on 2026-03-31. INFERENCE: SAFE owns long-duration ground leases (typically ~99-year; IR decks cite ~91–92 year weighted-average extended lease term), so the equity mark is rate-sensitive — lower discount rates support re-rating toward/above the deal mark. JUDGMENT cases: low ~$12 SAFE forced sale; base near current mark with friction; high ~$25 deal-mark path. Margin Loan $92.8M first-priority pledge (Note 9).
additive_components.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings and mark-to-market updates before IC approval.
additive_components.assumption_summary: Low/base/high vary SAFE mark and sale friction. High case is a rate-driven re-rating toward the March 2023 ~$25 deal mark, not a contractual put.
additive_components.falsifier: SAFE fails to re-rate with lower rates, or forced sale/collateral path nets below the low case.

additive_components.label: MD&A monetizing loans, AFS securities, land, other properties
additive_components.evidence: FACT Q1 MD&A monetizing portfolio: loan $16.1M + ten AFS debt securities $38.2M + land $14.4M + two properties $2.7M = $71.4M ($5.91/sh). Zero-carry loans/equity interests disclosed with no assurance of recovery. Q1 land-development sales revenue $11.0M / COS $9.3M; Surfhouse mezz $10.6M repaid 3/27/2026 (8-K). Source: 10-Q MD&A; Note 5/6; 8-K 2026-04-01. INFERENCE from 10-K/10-Q land-sale margins: the $14.4M monetizing land sleeve may realize above carrying; loans/AFS remain nearer mark-to-market/par.
additive_components.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings and mark-to-market updates before IC approval.
additive_components.assumption_summary: Low/base/high vary recovery vs carrying on the MD&A schedule only; Magnolia/Asbury residual is separate.
additive_components.falsifier: Sale/repayment proceeds imply recovery below $3.50/sh on this bucket.

additive_components.label: Magnolia Green and residual Asbury land / operating real estate
additive_components.evidence: FACT YE2025 10-K Note 5 dispositions: land development revenue vs cost of sales 2025 $46.4M / $28.8M (+$17.6M), 2024 $60.0M / $48.7M (+$11.3M), 2023 $72.4M / $62.7M (+$9.7M). FACT Q1 2026: land development revenue $11.0M vs COS $9.3M (+$1.7M). INFERENCE: actively selling land/lots above carrying cost of sales — GAAP book understates realizable value for the monetizing land/development sleeve. FACT Q1 accum. depreciation: RE $28.784M + L&D $10.547M = $39.3M (~$3.26/sh) — upper bound on pure depreciation add-back for depreciable assets; land itself is not depreciated the same way. FACT 10-K: Company did not sell operating real estate (buildings) in 2025 or 2023 — Asbury hotel/ops premium to book is unproven by closed sales. FACT residual carrying after removing MD&A monetizing land/other ≈ $12.72/sh. Sources: 10-K Note 5; 10-Q Notes 4–5; Item 1 Magnolia/Asbury.
additive_components.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings and mark-to-market updates before IC approval.
additive_components.assumption_summary: Base applies a milder haircut than carrying because lot sales clear above COS; high adds partial depreciation / entitlement uplift; low remains distressed.
additive_components.falsifier: Monetization clears below $4/sh after costs on this residual bucket.

additive_components.label: Cash and restricted cash
additive_components.evidence: FACT Q1 balance sheet / Note 8: cash $46.378M + restricted cash $15.681M = $62.059M ($5.14/sh). Prior research incorrectly used YE $67.2M for Q1.
additive_components.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings and mark-to-market updates before IC approval.
additive_components.assumption_summary: Cash is near carrying; low allows modest restricted-cash leakage.
additive_components.falsifier: Restricted cash is unavailable for equity or required as additional margin collateral.

additive_components.label: Safe Credit Facility and Margin Loan Facility
additive_components.evidence: FACT Note 9: Safe Credit Facility $115M at 8.00% (10% if incremental drawn), maturity March 2028; Margin Loan $92.8M at SOFR+3.50%, PIK option (+25bp after PIK), secured by first-priority pledge of Safe Shares, maturity March 2028, delayed-draw capacity ~$15.8M. Total debt obligations net $207.0M ($17.13/sh). CORRECTED: prior -1.19/sh was wrong; (cash-debt)/shares ≈ -12.0. Exact LTV/collateral-posting triggers not numerically disclosed (only that Mar-2025 amendment eased them).
additive_components.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings and mark-to-market updates before IC approval.
additive_components.assumption_summary: Low allows PIK accretion / incremental draws; high assumes modest paydown from sales.
additive_components.falsifier: Debt claims exceed $17.50/sh or collateral call forces SAFE sale below low stake value.

additive_components.label: External management fees, termination overhang, and sale friction
additive_components.evidence: FACT Note 1: annual auto-renewal each March 31; terminate without cause with ≥180 days notice and ≥2/3 independent trustee vote. Before 2027-03-31, termination fee = $55M minus fees paid (≈$5M overhang after $50M paid through 2026-03-31). After 2027-03-31, that termination-fee trigger no longer applies to without-cause terminations under the disclosed formula. FACT current term fee $7.5M; thereafter 2% GBV ex-SAFE. JUDGMENT: H2 2026 is the practical window to run a manager RFP so a replacement can be effective at/after the 2027-03-31 fee cliff — not an immediate free option today. Safe Governance Agreement still restricts certain SAFE-share transfers. Cash taxes de minimis (DTA allowance to zero; $0.2M paid in 2025).
additive_components.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings and mark-to-market updates before IC approval.
additive_components.assumption_summary: Base assumes Safehold remains manager through most of the wind-down; high assumes post-2027-03-31 competitive management / lower fee drag; low keeps termination overhang + high friction.
additive_components.falsifier: Fees, termination payment, or tax leakage exceed $2.50/sh present value.

additive_components.label: Zero-carry claims and entitlement surplus option
additive_components.evidence: FACT MD&A: group of loans/equity interests recorded at zero carrying value; no assurance of recovery. FACT Magnolia entitled 3,550 units / ~193 commercial acres — surplus above residual carrying is not contracted. Only incremental value beyond magnolia_asbury_development_ops carrying cases.
additive_components.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings and mark-to-market updates before IC approval.
additive_components.assumption_summary: Failure value zero; high credits modest surplus/zero-carry recovery.
additive_components.falsifier: No surplus to carrying and zero-carry assets remain worthless.

JUDGMENT cases: low ~$12 SAFE forced sale; base near current mark with friction; high ~$25 deal-mark path. Margin Loan $92.8M first-priority pledge (Note 9).

valuation_proof.falsifier: SAFE fails to re-rate with lower rates, or forced sale/collateral path nets below the low case.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: MD&A monetizing loans, AFS securities, land, other properties
valuation_proof.evidence: FACT Q1 MD&A monetizing portfolio: loan $16.1M + ten AFS debt securities $38.2M + land $14.4M + two properties $2.7M = $71.4M ($5.91/sh). Zero-carry loans/equity interests disclosed with no assurance of recovery. Q1 land-development sales revenue $11.0M / COS $9.3M; Surfhouse mezz $10.6M repaid 3/27/2026 (8-K). Source: 10-Q MD&A; Note 5/6; 8-K 2026-04-01. INFERENCE from 10-K/10-Q land-sale margins: the $14.4M monetizing land sleeve may realize above carrying; loans/AFS remain nearer mark-to-market/par.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Sale/repayment proceeds imply recovery below $3.50/sh on this bucket.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Realization is modeled through the five-year wind-down horizon, with specific sale and repayment timing remaining uncertain.
risk_and_timing.probability_basis: The recovery range applies haircuts to the disclosed loans, AFS securities, land, and properties; the base case relies on repayment and land-sale evidence while zero-carry claims receive no value here.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No incremental development capital is attributed to this monetizing bucket; sale costs and wind-down friction are deducted separately in wind_down_fee_and_friction_reserve.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Magnolia Green and residual Asbury land / operating real estate
valuation_proof.evidence: FACT YE2025 10-K Note 5 dispositions: land development revenue vs cost of sales 2025 $46.4M / $28.8M (+$17.6M), 2024 $60.0M / $48.7M (+$11.3M), 2023 $72.4M / $62.7M (+$9.7M). FACT Q1 2026: land development revenue $11.0M vs COS $9.3M (+$1.7M). INFERENCE: actively selling land/lots above carrying cost of sales — GAAP book understates realizable value for the monetizing land/development sleeve. FACT Q1 accum. depreciation: RE $28.784M + L&D $10.547M = $39.3M (~$3.26/sh) — upper bound on pure depreciation add-back for depreciable assets; land itself is not depreciated the same way. FACT 10-K: Company did not sell operating real estate (buildings) in 2025 or 2023 — Asbury hotel/ops premium to book is unproven by closed sales. FACT residual carrying after removing MD&A monetizing land/other ≈ $12.72/sh. Sources: 10-K Note 5; 10-Q Notes 4–5; Item 1 Magnolia/Asbury.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Monetization clears below $4/sh after costs on this residual bucket.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Land and operating-real-estate realization is modeled over the five-year wind-down horizon; no immediate sale of the remaining operating real estate is assumed.
risk_and_timing.probability_basis: The base case gives partial credit to carrying value because 2023 through Q1 2026 land and lot sales exceeded cost of sales, while the low case allows slow or distressed realization and the high case approaches carrying.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: The component is valued after its carrying-value haircut; no separate development budget is added, and fee and sale-friction deductions remain in wind_down_fee_and_friction_reserve.

valuation_proof.evidence: FACT Q1 balance sheet / Note 8: cash $46.378M + restricted cash $15.681M = $62.059M ($5.14/sh). Prior research incorrectly used YE $67.2M for Q1.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Restricted cash is unavailable for equity or required as additional margin collateral.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Safe Credit Facility and Margin Loan Facility
valuation_proof.evidence: FACT Note 9: Safe Credit Facility $115M at 8.00% (10% if incremental drawn), maturity March 2028; Margin Loan $92.8M at SOFR+3.50%, PIK option (+25bp after PIK), secured by first-priority pledge of Safe Shares, maturity March 2028, delayed-draw capacity ~$15.8M. Total debt obligations net $207.0M ($17.13/sh). CORRECTED: prior -1.19/sh was wrong; (cash-debt)/shares ≈ -12.0. Exact LTV/collateral-posting triggers not numerically disclosed (only that Mar-2025 amendment eased them).
valuation_proof.adjustment: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Debt claims exceed $17.50/sh or collateral call forces SAFE sale below low stake value.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: External management fees, termination overhang, and sale friction
valuation_proof.evidence: FACT Note 1: annual auto-renewal each March 31; terminate without cause with ≥180 days notice and ≥2/3 independent trustee vote. Before 2027-03-31, termination fee = $55M minus fees paid (≈$5M overhang after $50M paid through 2026-03-31). After 2027-03-31, that termination-fee trigger no longer applies to without-cause terminations under the disclosed formula. FACT current term fee $7.5M; thereafter 2% GBV ex-SAFE. JUDGMENT: H2 2026 is the practical window to run a manager RFP so a replacement can be effective at/after the 2027-03-31 fee cliff — not an immediate free option today. Safe Governance Agreement still restricts certain SAFE-share transfers. Cash taxes de minimis (DTA allowance to zero; $0.2M paid in 2025).
valuation_proof.adjustment: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Fees, termination payment, or tax leakage exceed $2.50/sh present value.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Zero-carry claims and entitlement surplus option
valuation_proof.evidence: FACT MD&A: group of loans/equity interests recorded at zero carrying value; no assurance of recovery. FACT Magnolia entitled 3,550 units / ~193 commercial acres — surplus above residual carrying is not contracted. Only incremental value beyond magnolia_asbury_development_ops carrying cases.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
valuation_proof.falsifier: No surplus to carrying and zero-carry assets remain worthless.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Any recovery is treated as a contingent result within the five-year wind-down horizon, not as current cash or a contracted asset sale.
risk_and_timing.probability_basis: The low case assigns zero, the base assigns only $0.20 per share, and the high case requires incremental recovery from zero-carry claims or entitlement surplus beyond Magnolia/Asbury carrying cases.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No incremental owner-funded development spend is credited to this option; any continuing holding, entitlement, management, or sale costs are captured in the existing operating and wind-down reserve components.

wisdom_applied: Klarman: book is an anchor; prior -1.19 cash/debt identity was a false bridge.
Greenblatt: finite asset-sale / capital-return event tree.
Horizon Kinetics: market-structure discount on a post-spin orphan.
limitations: Exact integer SAFE share count not disclosed (derived from FV/price).
Numeric margin LTV trigger levels not disclosed in 10-Q.
No asset-level third-party bids for Magnolia/Asbury residual.

ownership_waterfall.net_economic_claim: One diluted STHO share claim on SAFE stake, legacy monetizing assets, Magnolia/Asbury residual, cash, less senior debt, fee reserve, and incremental options.
excluded_claims: Zero-carry loans valued only in zero_carry_and_entitlement_option, not legacy_monetizing_portfolio.
Magnolia/Asbury residual separated from MD&A monetizing schedule to avoid double count.
Margin Loan secured by SAFE shares; SAFE marked gross in safehold_equity_stake.
ownership_waterfall.reconciliation: Component proof sum base ≈ $18.1/sh vs Q1 book $19.88/sh cross-check; SAFE mark, debt bridge, and fee reserve reconciled in evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-24.md.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Safehold Inc. equity stake (~13.525M shares)
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

economic_ownership_map.label: Safehold Inc. equity stake (~13.525M shares)
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Low/base/high vary SAFE mark and sale friction. High case is a rate-driven re-rating toward the March 2023 ~$25 deal mark, not a contractual put.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: FACT spin/merger mark: SAFE closed $25.80 on 2023-03-31 (Yahoo; post 0.16 split on merger day), ~$25/share round number. At 13,525,499 implied shares that is $338.1M = $27.99/STHO share vs current Yahoo SAFE $16.93 → $18.95/STHO share (about -32% below deal mark). FACT Q1 10-Q Note 7: ~13.5M shares / 18.8%, FV $183.0M at $13.53 on 2026-03-31. INFERENCE: SAFE owns long-duration ground leases (typically ~99-year; IR decks cite ~91–92 year weighted-average extended lease term), so the equity mark is rate-sensitive — lower discount rates support re-rating toward/above the deal mark. JUDGMENT cases: low ~$12 SAFE forced sale; base near current mark with friction; high ~$25 deal-mark path. Margin Loan $92.8M first-priority pledge (Note 9).
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: SAFE fails to re-rate with lower rates, or forced sale/collateral path nets below the low case.

operating cash flow and NAV counted twice

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only the terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Magnolia Green and residual Asbury land / operating real estate
MD&A monetizing loans, AFS securities, land, other properties
External management fees, termination overhang, and sale friction
Zero-carry claims and entitlement surplus option

falsifiers: SAFE fails to re-rate with lower rates, or forced sale/collateral path nets below the low case.
Sale/repayment proceeds imply recovery below $3.50/sh on this bucket.
Monetization clears below $4/sh after costs on this residual bucket.
Restricted cash is unavailable for equity or required as additional margin collateral.
Debt claims exceed $17.50/sh or collateral call forces SAFE sale below low stake value.
Fees, termination payment, or tax leakage exceed $2.50/sh present value.
No surplus to carrying and zero-carry assets remain worthless.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material economic claim is valued exactly once and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
